faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I add a new property?
faq.a1: Go to the Dashboard page, press the "Add Property" button in Quick Actions. Enter the property name, address, and monthly billing date.
faq.q2: How do I add a tenant?
faq.a2: You can add a tenant via Quick Actions on the Dashboard or from the Property > Room page. Select an empty room and enter the tenant's details.
faq.q3: How do I generate monthly bills?
faq.a3: Go to the Bills page, select the property and month. Enter utility bills (electricity, water, internet) first, then press "Generate Bills" to auto-generate bills for all tenants.
faq.q4: How do I record a payment?
faq.a4: On the Payments page, tap on a tenant's bill to view details. Press "Record Payment", enter the amount and payment method (bank transfer, DuitNow, cash).
faq.q5: Can I send bills via WhatsApp?
faq.a5: Yes! On the Payments page, each bill has a WhatsApp button to send bills, payment reminders, or receipts directly to the tenant.
faq.q6: What if a tenant pays partially?
faq.a6: ReRumah supports partial payments. Record the amount paid and the system will automatically update the balance. The bill status will change to "Partial".
faq.a7: You can choose a splitting method: sub-meter (per room reading), equal split, fixed amount per room, or landlord absorbs entirely.
faq.a8: Yes. ReRumah uses Supabase with Row-Level Security (RLS). Each user can only view their own data. Data is encrypted during transmission.

move_out.title: Move Out
move_out.no_deductions: No deductions. Press "Add" if there is damage or debt.
move_out.warning: This action cannot be undone. Room status will change to "Vacant".

landing.hero_subtitle: The all-in-one platform for Malaysian landlords and tenants. Billing, payments, agreements — all in one app.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to manage rentals
landing.features_subtitle: From property setup to payment collection — all in one place.
landing.feat_property_desc: Add properties, manage rooms, track occupancy. See everything at a glance from your dashboard.
landing.feat_billing_desc: Auto-generate monthly bills with utility splitting. Sub-meter, equal split, fixed, or landlord-absorbed.
landing.feat_payments_desc: Tenants pay via FPX or DuitNow through ToyyibPay. Payments auto-recorded and tracked.
landing.feat_agreements_desc: Create digital agreements with terms, rules, and e-signatures. Download as PDF anytime.
landing.feat_whatsapp_desc: Send bills, reminders, and receipts directly via WhatsApp. Pre-formatted messages, one tap.
landing.feat_reports_desc: Monthly collection summaries and annual LHDN tax reports. Export to CSV for your accountant.
landing.step1_desc: Set up your properties and rooms with rent amounts. Takes less than 2 minutes.
landing.step2_desc: Send an invite link. Tenants register themselves and sign the rental agreement.
landing.step3_desc: Monthly bills created automatically. Track payments, send reminders, view reports.
landing.faq1_a: Yes! ReRumah offers a free tier with 1 property, unlimited rooms, and all core features. The first 30 users also get Pro for free — use code RERUMAH30 on the Plans page.
landing.faq2_a: Landlords record payments manually — bank transfer, DuitNow, or cash. Online payment via FPX is coming soon.
landing.faq3_a: Absolutely. We use Supabase (built on PostgreSQL) with Row-Level Security. Your data is encrypted and only accessible to you and your tenants.
landing.faq4_q: Do I need to install anything?
landing.faq4_a: No installation needed. ReRumah is a Progressive Web App (PWA) — just open it in your browser. You can also add it to your home screen for a native app experience.
landing.faq5_q: Can I use ReRumah in Bahasa Malaysia?
landing.faq5_a: Yes! ReRumah supports both English and Bahasa Malaysia. You can switch languages anytime from the menu.
landing.cta_title: Ready to simplify your rental management?
landing.cta_subtitle: Join landlords across Malaysia who are saving hours every month with ReRumah.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: ReRumah ("we", "our", "us") is a property management platform for landlords and tenants in Malaysia. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.s2_intro: We collect the following data when you use ReRumah:
privacy.s2_item1: Account information: name, email address, phone number, IC number (optional)
privacy.s2_item2: Property and tenancy data: property names, addresses, room details, rent amounts, billing records
privacy.s2_item3: Payment records: payment amounts, methods, and dates (we do not store bank account or card numbers)
privacy.s2_item4: Usage data: language preference, device type, and app interactions
privacy.s3_item1: Provide the ReRumah service — billing, tenant management, agreements, and reports
privacy.s3_item2: Send notifications — bill reminders, payment receipts, and agreement updates via email
privacy.s3_item3: Improve the platform — understanding usage patterns to build better features
privacy.s4_body: Your data is stored on Supabase (built on PostgreSQL) with Row-Level Security (RLS) enforced at the database level. Each user can only access their own data. All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS) and at rest. We do not sell or share your data with advertisers.
privacy.s5_intro: We use the following third-party services to operate ReRumah:
privacy.s5_item1: Supabase — database, authentication, and serverless functions
privacy.s5_item2: Resend — transactional email delivery (bills, receipts, reminders)
privacy.s5_item3: Google — OAuth sign-in (only if you choose to sign in with Google)
privacy.s6_body: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us. Upon deletion, your data is permanently removed within 30 days.
privacy.s7_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can update your profile information directly in the app, or contact us to request data export or account deletion.
privacy.s8_body: For questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at marwanbukhori.dev@gmail.com.
